description: Fragment of a short letter to Yosef b. Ya’aqov b. Awkal, Fustat. It could be that a person from a Yeshiva in Iraq wrote the letter. He confirms that he received b. Awkal’s letter with questions, as usual. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #202) VMR
description_he: שרידי מכתב קצר ליוסף בן יעקב בן אוקאל, פוסטאט, כנראה מישיבה בעיראק, אישור קבלת שאלות
